background.finding: Stage43-A found no clearly adaptable naturalistic external validation source in the repository and no VitaminC/FEVER/RTE/MNLI/SNLI-style source file.
background.stage43b0: Stage43-B0 created a file-based converter plus schema and intake-plan reports.

stage43b1.purpose: Acquire a user-specified FEVER/VitaminC-style HuggingFace dataset with datasets.load_dataset and convert accepted rows into the Stage43 canonical external validation JSONL schema.
stage43b1.scope: Acquisition/preparation only. No model training, model evaluation, external probe evaluation, Kaggle command, smoke test, py_compile, help check, local model execution, or dataset download was run during implementation.

source_priority.rationale: FEVER/VitaminC directly support SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED-style fact verification.
source_priority.rte: RTE is not a primary NOT_ENTITLED test because not_entailment conflates contradiction with neutral or insufficient evidence.
source_priority.mnli_snli: MNLI/SNLI can be used later only as auxiliary NLI transfer diagnostics, not as primary fact-verification validation.

stage43b2_gate: Stage43-B2 should run external final-composer evaluation only after a valid FEVER/VitaminC acquisition report exists.
leakage_policy: Acquired data must not be used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, loss design, or any other model-selection feedback loop.
guardrails: Do not run the acquisition script during implementation.
Do not download data during implementation.
Do not run model training or evaluation.
Do not infer labels from model predictions.
Do not treat RTE not_entailment as REFUTE.
Do not treat synthetic Stage34/35 probes as naturalistic external evidence.
Do not alter existing source reports or previous stage outputs.
recommendation: Use Stage43-B1 to acquire a genuine FEVER/VitaminC-style external validation JSONL and provenance report, then proceed to Stage43-B2 eval-only work only if the acquisition report is valid.
